definition: Endpoint-direct variables excluded; top nonconstant features selected by train-set completeness and variance.
leakage_control: Direct endpoint regex excluded before encoder fitting.

definition: CONSTAT1 code 42; denominator is the NSFG analytic female respondent population, interpreted as a current vulnerability proxy rather than an incident pregnancy outcome
HLPPRG code 1 or HLPMC code 1, indicating ever receiving medical help to become pregnant or to prevent miscarriage
Among respondents with pregnancy records, any NEWWANTR code 3/4/6, WANTRESP code 3/5, WANTPART code 3/5, TIMINGOK code 3, or WANTBOLD code 5
Among respondents with pregnancy records, any public-use low-birthweight live birth indicator (LBW1 code 1) or stillbirth outcome (OUTCOME code 3)
FECUND code 2-5 or INFERT code 1-2, using public-use NSFG fecundity or infertility recodes and excluding FECUND code 1 contraceptive sterilization
